CREQ_ts_session.title: Session interface shape
CREQ_ts_session.content: The interface Session shall declare token and user fields as strings.

CREQ_ts_session_manager.title: SessionManager opens sessions
CREQ_ts_session_manager.content: The class SessionManager shall expose open() and throw SessionError when the manager is not ready.

CREQ_ts_create_session.title: createSession factory
CREQ_ts_create_session.content: The function createSession shall throw InvalidUserError when the user argument is empty.

CREQ_ts_default_timeout.title: DEFAULT_TIMEOUT constant
CREQ_ts_default_timeout.content: The constant DEFAULT_TIMEOUT shall default the session-open timeout to 30 seconds.
